verses.text: Tua ahih manin sanggamte aw, note ka hong it mahmah a, nakpi takin ka hong goih hi. Note in nakpi takin kei na hong lungnuamsak uh a, note ka hong angtan'pih mahmah hi. Tua hi a, sanggamte aw, Topa sungah kiptakin nungta un
Euodia leh Sintikhe, Topa' hangin a kilemkik ding uh ka thum nuam hi

Hih numei nihte in Klement leh a nungta mite a kikhumna Pasian' laibu sungah a kikhum, ka naseppih dangte khempeuh tawh, lungdamna thu a kizelhna dingin nakpi takin kei tawh na hong semkhawm uh ahih manin, citakin kei tawh na a semkhawm note in zong amaute gel na huhna dingun ka hong thum hi
Topa sungah lungdam tawntung un, ka hong cihsa bangin tu-in zong lungdam un, ka hong ci kik hi
Mi khempeuh tungah na dik un. Topa hong pai baih ta ding hi
Thu khat peuhpeuhah lunghimawh lua kei un la, na kisap bangbang uh, lungdamna tawh Pasian kiangah na ngen un
Mihingte in a theihtel zawhloh Pasian' hong piak lungsim nopna in, Khrih Jesuh tawh na kipawlna uh hangin note hong lungnuamsak ding hi.
Sanggamte aw, a tawpna-ah ka hong gennop thu in, a hoih leh a phattaak thute tawh na lungsim uh na kidimsak un. Tuate in: A man, a dik, a tang, a siangtho, a deihhuai, leh a pahtakhuai thute ahi hi
Keima genna leh ka gamtatna panin thei-in na san' uh thute, nomau pumpi mahmah tawh na zui un. Tua hi leh nopsakna a hong piathei Pasian in note hong ompih ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Filippi Mite' Na Khakte' Hangin Lungdam Zaksakna

verses.text: Topa' hangin ka lungdamna lian mahmah hi. Hun sauveipi khit ciangin kei na hong phawkna uh na hong langsakkik thei uh hi. Kei hong kinloin omngei uh teh, a ci ka hi kei a, na hong kinna uh na hong lahna ding uh hun om theilo, ka cihna ahi hi
Bangbangin om ta leng a lungkim thei dingin a kisinsa ka hih manin hihbang ka hong gen ciangin ka kitangsapna a hong pulak nuam ka hi kei hi
Cihmawhna leh cihtheihna a sinsa ka hi hi. Tua ahih manin ka hau a ka zawng zongin, ka vah a ka kial zongin, koi mun koi mun hita lehah a lungkimthei dingin a kisinsa ka hi hi
Khrih in a hong piak vangliatna tawh hihte khempeuh nawkzawhna ding thahatna a nei ka hi hi
Ahi zongin ka lungkham laitakin na hong huh manun hoih mahmah hi

Na theihsa uh mah bangin Lungdamna Thu ka hilh cil lai-in note' gam Masedonia panin ka paikhiat hunin no Filippi pawlpite bek mah in kei na hong huh uh a, ka ngahna leh ka piakkhiatnate, note bek mah in a hong theihpih na hi uh hi
Thesalonika khua-ah cimawhin ka om lai-in huhna nong puak uh khatvei bek hilo hi
Note tung panin na tampi ka ngahnop man hilo a, note' hamphatna a kibehlapna ding ka deihna hizaw hi

Note' hong piak nate kicing piikpeek hi. Epafroditas in note' hong na khakte hong tun'pih ahih manin ka kitangsapna khempeuh kicingkim hi. Hih nate pen Pasian biakna-in na piak uh, lungdam takin a hong san', a namtui nate ahi hi
A na ka sep i Topa Pasian in ama hauhna tawh kizui-in Khrih Jesuh hangin note' kitangsapna khempeuh hong pia ding hi
I Pa Pasian in a tawntungin minthan'na ngah ta hen. Amen.
Khrih Jesuh sungah a om mi siangthote khempeuh na na hopihsak un. Kei tawh a omkhawm kamsangte khempeuh in zong note hong hopih uh hi
Hih lai-a om Khristian khempeuh, a diakdiakin kumpi nasem i lawmte in note hong hopih uh hi
Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha, note khempeuh tungah hong tung ta hen.
